steps.title: Identify the median position
steps.content: The data are already sorted and there are $9$ values. For an odd number of values, the median is the middle value, at position $(9+1)/2=5$.

steps.title: Check with Desmos
steps.content: Enter the values as a list and use `median`. This is faster than recounting if the list is long or not already sorted.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The fifth value is $79$, and Desmos gives $\operatorname{median}(l_1)=79$. The answer is 79.
